summary: Elric, the main character, has been kidnapped by a crazy old man who is training him as his apprentice. Meanwhile, Paul Weyl, who lost his chance to become the next Blue Lion because of Elric's actions, sends Hilton from the Blue Wolf Squad No. 1 to prevent Elric from meeting the Blue Lion. However, Elric has already been kidnapped and is being trained in magic by a mysterious old man.
key_moments: Elric is kidnapped by a crazy old man
Paul Weyl sends Hilton to prevent Elric from meeting the Blue Lion
Elric meets his new teacher, who reveals himself as Gealty, the Leader of the Resistance
